description: Percentage of good parts out of total parts produced

calculation.cypher: CASE WHEN (m.Good_Parts + coalesce(m.Scrap_Parts,0) + coalesce(m.Rework_Parts,0)) = 0 THEN null ELSE round(toFloat(m.Good_Parts) / (m.Good_Parts + coalesce(m.Scrap_Parts,0) + coalesce(m.Rework_Parts,0)) * 1000) / 10 END
